identity.name: Placify AI
identity.tagline: Your Personal Career Coach for Placements
identity.design_philosophy: Deep Space Intelligence - A dark, immersive interface that feels like a futuristic command center for your career.

grid_system.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 md:gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(99,102,241,0.5)] transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 border border-slate-700 backdrop-blur-sm transition-all hover:border-slate-500 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium

cards.base: bg-slate-950/50 backdrop-blur-xl border border-slate-800/50 rounded-2xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden

inputs.default: bg-slate-900/50 border-slate-800 focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500 rounded-lg py-2.5 px-4 text-slate-200 placeholder:text-slate-600 transition-all

effects.spotlight: before:absolute before:h-full before:w-1/2 before:rounded-full before:bg-gradient-to-r before:from-transparent before:via-white/5 before:to-transparent before:blur-2xl before:content-[''] hover:before:animate-shine

shapes.blob: absolute top-0 -left-4 w-72 h-72 bg-purple-500 rounded-full mix-blend-multiply filter blur-xl opacity-20 animate-blob
shapes.blob_delay: absolute top-0 -right-4 w-72 h-72 bg-indigo-500 rounded-full mix-blend-multiply filter blur-xl opacity-20 animate-blob animation-delay-2000

libraries.charts: Recharts (use highly customized tooltips and transparent backgrounds)
libraries.icons: Lucide React (primary), Simple Icons (for tech logos)

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text is APCA compliant against dark backgrounds.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible indigo-500 ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-offset-slate-900 on all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL_DEPENDENCIES: npm install framer-motion lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge recharts @monaco-editor/react sonner
THEME_SETUP: Ensure 'dark' class is applied to the html element by default in index.html or App.js.
FONT_SETUP: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
LAYOUT_STRATEGY: Use the 'Bento Grid' strategy for the dashboard. Do not use simple rows.
COMPONENT_OVERRIDE: When using Shadcn, override the default 'border' colors to use the subtle slate tones defined in colors.surface.border.
GLASSMORPHISM: Apply glassmorphism to the Sidebar and Sticky Navbar. Use 'backdrop-blur-xl' and 'bg-slate-950/80'.
CHART_STYLING: Style Recharts to match the dark theme. Remove grid lines or make them extremely subtle (opacity 5%). Use custom Tooltips.
GAME_MECHANICS: Implement XP progress bars and badges using the 'accents.gamification' color (Pink/Purple) to make them pop against the dark theme.
CODING_EDITOR: Use a dark theme for the Monaco Editor (vs-dark) to match the app UI.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
